scene_1.visual_plan: Begin with a medium shot of the model looking directly at the camera with natural, steady handheld motion to create an intimate and casual feel, shallow depth of field focusing on the model’s eyes and face, set in a softly lit indoor environment. After the model says the first sentence, cut to a close-up of the product held in the model’s right hand near the face, with the branding clearly visible, using a tripod shot with a slight focus pull from hand to product details. Return to the medium shot with the model still looking into the camera as she continues speaking. Midway, introduce a secondary angle showing the model gently applying or holding the serum at eye level, with the product clearly in the foreground and softly blurred background, emphasizing usage. Close the scene with the model holding the product in her right hand close to the camera for a few seconds while maintaining eye contact, then gently zoom out to finish the dialogue, maintaining a natural conversational pace.
scene_1.dialogue: I regret not doing this sooner in lash care because I used to struggle with weak. sensitive lashes that barely grew despite trying everything. Then I found ETERNAL EYELASH Premium. and honestly. it felt different from the start. my lashes became visibly fuller and more resilient without any irritation—even with my lash extensions. If you want better lashes that actually last. this is a game changer.
